title: SHROOM: Shared-task on Hallucinations and Related Observable Overgeneration Mistakes
description: Binary hallucination detection in NLG outputs. Annotators judge whether a generated text contains hallucinations (overgeneration) relative to the input, with confidence rating. Covers three NLG tasks: machine translation (MT), definition modeling (DM), and paraphrase generation (PG).
